title: polygala amara var. austriaca
intro: Polygala amara var. austriaca, also known as Alpine milkwort, is a subspecies of the Polygala amara plant, a type of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala amara var. austriaca include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. Herbal preparations of Polygala amara var. austriaca are typically made from the leaves and roots of the plant, which can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions to reap its medicinal benefits.
